response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: The vocal performance matches the provided lyrics for 'Paradise Lost'. However, the Reference JSON failed to capture the intro song, 'Diamond Crevasse', which I have manually transcribed and synchronized. 2. JSON Usage: Fully utilized the lyrics of 'Paradise Lost' for translation and transcription assistance, but manually transcribed the intro. 3. Timing & Pacing: Subtitles are precisely anchored to vocal audio triggers, with silent instrumental breaks carefully omitted.

subtitles.original: ひとりじゃないと
subtitles.english: That I am not alone...

subtitles.original: 囁いてほしい プラネット
subtitles.english: Whisper it to me, Planet

subtitles.original: 聖なる瞳が 痛みを映したら
subtitles.english: If my saint-like eyes reflect pain...

subtitles.original: 振り向いてごらん？ 情熱放つ trick
subtitles.english: Will you look back? A passion-releasing trick

subtitles.original: 崩れる足元 二人は戻れない
subtitles.english: Our crumbling footing, we two can't return

subtitles.original: 差し伸べた手をほどかないで
subtitles.english: Don't let go of my outstretched hand

subtitles.original: 消えるよ また優しい日々が
subtitles.english: Those tender days have disappeared once again

subtitles.original: 思い出を汚すのは許せない
subtitles.english: I won't allow our memories to be tainted

subtitles.original: ここは裏切りの楽園 さ迷う心の涯に
subtitles.english: This is the paradise of betrayal, at the end of my wandering heart

subtitles.original: 光を求めて 祈る言葉届け あなたに
subtitles.english: Searching for the light, I pray these words reach you

subtitles.original: 囚われの羽が 遥かな空へと向かう
subtitles.english: These imprisoned wings head towards the distant sky

subtitles.original: 信じたいよ 私たち孤独じゃない
subtitles.english: I want to believe that we are not alone

subtitles.original: 分かり合う (求め合う) 絆の中
subtitles.english: Understanding each other (seeking each other) within this bond

subtitles.original: 離さない (離れない) 始まる destiny
subtitles.english: I won't let go (I won't separate), our destiny begins

subtitles.original: 新たな願いに 鎖ほどける時
subtitles.english: With a new wish, when our chains are removed

subtitles.original: 休ませてくれる？ 深い眠りに
subtitles.english: Will you let me rest? In a deep sleep...

subtitles.original: 僅かな希望が 私を強くする
subtitles.english: This small hope makes me strong

subtitles.original: ぬくもりに触れてみたいから
subtitles.english: Because I want to feel your warmth

subtitles.original: 蘇れば 儚きいのち
subtitles.english: If resurrected, this fleeting life...

subtitles.original: 繰り返す愛しさが 導いた
subtitles.english: Led by a love that repeats over and over

subtitles.original: 胸に泡沫の調べ 流れる世界の終わり
subtitles.english: A transient melody in my heart, at the end of this flowing world

subtitles.original: 諦めはしない 今が繋ぐ明日探そう
subtitles.english: I won't give up, let's search for tomorrow connected by today

subtitles.original: ちぎれ舞う羽は 未来の空にも向かう
subtitles.english: Torn wings fluttering, heading towards the sky of the future

subtitles.original: 忘れないで 私たちひとつの水晶
subtitles.english: Don't forget, we are a single crystal

subtitles.original: 輝いて (眩しくて) 割れないのよ
subtitles.english: Shining (dazzling), we won't shatter

subtitles.original: 離さない (離れない) 誓いの destiny
subtitles.english: I won't let go (I won't separate), our promised destiny

subtitles.original: Lost the paradise...
subtitles.english: Lost the paradise...

subtitles.original: 消えるよ また優しい日々が
subtitles.english: Those tender days have disappeared once again

subtitles.original: 思い出を汚すのは許せない
subtitles.english: I won't allow our memories to be tainted

subtitles.original: ここは裏切りの楽園 さ迷う心の涯に
subtitles.english: This is the paradise of betrayal, at the end of my wandering heart

subtitles.original: 光を求めて 祈る言葉届け あなたに
subtitles.english: Searching for the light, I pray these words reach you

subtitles.original: 囚われの羽が 遥かな空へと向かう
subtitles.english: These imprisoned wings head towards the distant sky

subtitles.original: 信じたいよ 私たち孤独じゃない
subtitles.english: I want to believe that we are not alone

subtitles.original: 分かり合う (求め合う) 絆の中
subtitles.english: Understanding each other (seeking each other) within this bond

subtitles.original: 離さない (離れない)
subtitles.english: I won't let go (I won't separate)...
